en.title: Presenter Bios
en.subtitle: Meet the educators and industry professionals behind PVHS Pathways.

es.title: Biografías de Presentadores
es.subtitle: Conoce a los educadores y profesionales de la industria detrás de PVHS Pathways.

presenters.name: Bryce Odegard
presenters.bio: Hi! My name is Bryce and I am the engine behind PVHS Pathways! PVHS Pathways is my Capstone Project that I am completing during my senior year at Spartanburg Methodist College. In addition to my studies at SMC, I also work in the Grants Department at Nye County School District. If you have any questions about the project or would like additional help gaining access to resources or learning about more opportunities, please don't hesitate to reach out!

presenters.name: Jose Miranda
presenters.bio:
Jose Miranda is a recording engineer and alumnus of the Conservatory of Recording Arts & Sciences (CRAS). Since 2018, he has worked in professional recording studios across Phoenix, Las Vegas, and Los Angeles, spending nearly a decade fully immersed in music and the recording industry. His work spans a wide range of genres, and he holds a Gold Plaque certified by the RIAA.
Beyond music, Jose has contributed to projects for Disney Channel, MTV, Chick-fil-A, and Peacock — a reflection of the versatility and practical skills that define a CRAS education. He landed his first studio position at 18 years old, a career he credits directly to his training at CRAS, and has never looked back.
